en.extract:
The forest wood hoopoe (Rhinopomastus castaneiceps) is a species of bird in the family Phoeniculidae.  It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Rwanda, and Uganda.

*''Phoeniculus castaneiceps'' *''Irrisor castaneiceps'' }} [[File:Rhinopomastus castaneiceps - Zac Peterson - 557873389.jpeg|thumb|On branch]] The '''forest wood hoopoe''' ('''''Rhinopomastus castaneiceps''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Phoeniculidae]]. It is found in [[Cameroon]], [[Central African Republic]], [[Republic of the Congo]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo]], [[Ivory Coast]], [[Ghana]], [[Guinea]], [[Liberia]], [[Nigeria]], [[Rwanda]], and [[Uganda]]. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q285978}} [[Category:Rhinopomastus]] [[Category:Birds of the African tropical rainforest]] [[Category:Birds described in 1871]] [[Category:Taxonomy articles created by Polbot]] [[Category:Taxobox binomials not recognized by IUCN]] {{Bucerotiformes-stub}}
